Query.SQL: (SELECT P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID" , NULL AS "CP.CODE" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE" , GA.VALID_FROM AS "GA.VALID_FROM" , GA.VALID_TO AS "GA.VALID_TO" , GA.UPDATED_BY AS "GA.UPDATED_BY" , GA.PARTY_ID AS "GA.PARTY_ID" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "P.DX_NUMBER" , P.TEL_NO AS "P.TEL_NO" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , P.FAX_NUMBER AS "P.FAX_NUMBER" , P.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "P.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "CPR.PAYEE_FLAG" , CPR.PREFERRED_COMMUNICATION_METHOD AS "CPR.PREF_COMM_METHOD" , CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR AS "CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR" , 'GA' AS "GA_TABLE_ALIAS" , 'EXISTING' AS "EXISTING_VALUE" , TO_CHAR(${param.solicitorRef}) AS "SOLICITOR_REF" , CPR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" , NULL AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR , PARTIES P , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = ${param.partyRoleCode} AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = ${param.casePartyNo} AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND GA.CASE_NUMBER = CPR.CASE_NUMBER AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO = CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'SOLICITOR' AND GA.VALID_TO IS NULL ) UNION ( SELECT P.PARTY_ID AS "P.PARTY_ID" , CP.CODE AS "CP.CODE" , GA.ADDRESS_ID AS "GA.ADDRESS_ID" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE1 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE1" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE2 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE2" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE3 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE3" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE4 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE4" , GA.ADDRESS_LINE5 AS "GA.ADDRESS_LINE5" , GA.POSTCODE AS "GA.POSTCODE" , GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE AS "GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE" , GA.VALID_FROM AS "GA.VALID_FROM" , GA.VALID_TO AS "GA.VALID_TO" , GA.UPDATED_BY AS "GA.UPDATED_BY" , GA.PARTY_ID AS "GA.PARTY_ID" , P.DX_NUMBER AS "P.DX_NUMBER" , P.TEL_NO AS "P.TEL_NO" , P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME AS "P.PERSON_REQUESTED_NAME" , P.FAX_NUMBER AS "P.FAX_NUMBER" , P.EMAIL_ADDRESS AS "P.EMAIL_ADDRESS" , CPR.PAYEE_FLAG AS "CPR.PAYEE_FLAG" , CPR.PREFERRED_COMMUNICATION_METHOD AS "CPR.PREF_COMM_METHOD" , CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR AS "CPR.WELSH_INDICATOR" , 'GA' AS "GA_TABLE_ALIAS" , 'EXISTING' AS "EXISTING_VALUE" , TO_CHAR(${param.solicitorRef}) AS "SOLICITOR_REF" , CPR.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CPR_ORA_ROWSCN" , P.ORA_ROWSCN AS "P_ORA_ROWSCN" , CP.ORA_ROWSCN AS "CP_ORA_ROWSCN" , GA.ORA_ROWSCN AS "GA_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM CASE_PARTY_ROLES CPR , PARTIES P , CODED_PARTIES CP , GIVEN_ADDRESSES GA WHERE CPR.CASE_NUMBER = ${param.caseNumber} AND CPR.PARTY_ROLE_CODE = ${param.partyRoleCode} AND CPR.CASE_PARTY_NO = ${param.casePartyNo} AND P.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND CP.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND GA.CASE_NUMBER IS NULL AND GA.PARTY_ROLE_CODE IS NULL AND GA.CASE_PARTY_NO IS NULL AND GA.PARTY_ID = CPR.PARTY_ID AND GA.ADDRESS_TYPE_CODE = 'CODED PARTY')
